query:
INSERT INTO agents (name, description, domain, persona, capabilities, status, successRate, avgResponseTime, tasksCompleted, isBuiltIn, config)
VALUES (
  'Force Majeure Contract Agent',
  'Extracts force majeure clauses from PDF/DOCX contracts, assesses GCC conflict triggers (US-Iran war, Hormuz disruption), returns a trigger verdict, drafts a formal notification letter, and produces a one-page risk summary. Supports Arabic and English contracts with RTL rendering.',
  'Legal',
  'Lawyer',
  '["clause_extraction","trigger_assessment","notification_drafting","risk_summary","arabic_rtl","pdf_export"]',
  'active',
  94,
  18000,
  0,
  1,
  '{"model":"default","layers":["extraction","legal_reasoning","drafting","risk_summary"],"supportedFormats":["pdf","docx"],"languages":["en","ar"]}'
);
